QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: surveyInAccuracyLimit
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: The minimum accuracy value that Survey-In must achieve before it can complete.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Survey in accuracy

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: surveyInMinObservationDuration
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Defines the minimum amount of observation time for the position calculation.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Min observation time

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: useFixedBasePosition
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Specify the mode for the RTK base 0: Survey-In (Fixed + Auto) 1: Specify position (Fixed + Manual)
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Use specified base mode

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: fixedBasePositionLatitude
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Defines the latitude of the fixed RTK base position.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Base Position Latitude

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: fixedBasePositionLongitude
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Defines the longitude of the fixed RTK base position.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Base Position Longitude

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: fixedBasePositionAltitude
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Defines the altitude of the fixed RTK base position.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Base Position Alt (WGS84)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: fixedBasePositionAccuracy
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Defines the accuracy of the fixed RTK base position.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Base Position Accuracy

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: gpsOutputMode
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Controls what data the GPS receiver outputs. GPS: position only. GPS+RTCM: position and RTK corrections. RTCM: corrections only (for dedicated base stations). Ignored for NMEA receivers which always use GPS mode.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Output mode

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxMode
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Operating mode for u-blox receivers. Normal: standard operation. RoverWithMovingBase: receives RTCM from a moving base on UART2 for heading. MovingBase: outputs RTCM on UART2 to a rover. GroundControlStation: NMEA output on UART2 for GCS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.enumStrings: Normal,Rover (Moving Base UART2),Moving Base UART2,Rover (Moving Base UART1),Moving Base UART1,Rover (Static Base UART2),Ground Control Station
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: U-blox mode

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxDynamicModel
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Dynamic platform model for the u-blox receiver. Affects position filtering. Portable (0) is general-purpose. Stationary (2) for fixed installations. Airborne models (6-8) for UAVs with different g-force limits.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Dynamic model

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxUart2Baudrate
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Baudrate for the u-blox receiver's UART2 port. Used for RTCM output in moving base mode or NMEA output in GCS mode.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UART2 baudrate

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxPpkOutput
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Enable Post-Processing Kinematic (PPK) raw measurement output. When enabled, the receiver outputs raw observation data for offline post-processing.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: PPK output

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxDgnssTimeout
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: DGNSS (differential GNSS) timeout in seconds. The receiver reverts to standalone mode if no corrections are received within this period. Set to 0 to disable.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: DGNSS timeout

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxMinCno
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Minimum carrier-to-noise ratio (C/N0) for a satellite to be used in navigation. Higher values reject weaker signals but may reduce satellite count.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Min C/N0

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxMinElevation
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Minimum satellite elevation angle for navigation. Satellites below this angle are excluded. Higher values reduce multipath but limit satellite count.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Min elevation

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxOutputRate
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Navigation solution output rate in milliseconds. Lower values give faster updates but increase processing load. Set to 0 to use the receiver default.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Output rate

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ubxJamDetSensitivityHi
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Enable high-sensitivity jamming/interference detection. When enabled, the receiver is more aggressive in detecting RF interference.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Jam detect high sensitivity

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: gnssSystems
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Bitmask of GNSS constellations to enable. 0 uses receiver defaults. Individual bits: 1=GPS, 2=SBAS, 4=Galileo, 8=BeiDou, 16=GLONASS, 32=NavIC.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: GNSS constellations

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: headingOffset
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Dual-antenna heading offset in degrees. Applied to Septentrio, U-blox, and NMEA heading calculations to compensate for antenna mounting orientation.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Heading offset

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: positionSourceType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Source of the GCS position (map center and NTRIP GGA). 'None' disables external sources; 'NMEA' uses a serial or UDP NMEA stream; 'RTK' uses a local RTK base receiver.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: GCS position source

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: autoConnectRTKGPS
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Automatically connect to RTK GPS receivers detected on USB.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: If this option is enabled GroundControl will automatically connect to an RTK GPS which is connected via USB.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Automatically connect to an RTK GPS

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: autoConnectNmeaPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: NMEA GPS device for GCS position
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: NMEA GPS device for GCS position
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: NMEA GPS device for GCS position

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: autoConnectNmeaBaud
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: NMEA GPS Baudrate
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: NMEA GPS Baudrate

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: nmeaUdpPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Udp port to receive NMEA streams
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Udp port to receive NMEA streams
